conquest.title: Conquest Mission
conquest.description: Conquer Eucalypta, Peaks and one more continent of a choice.

elimination.title: Elimination Mission
elimination.description: Eliminate Beaver. If Beaver is eliminated by another player, that player becomes your new target. This continues until you eliminate your current target or capture 20 territories.
